questions.prompt: Rosie says that in her own city the main problem is

options.label: crime
housing
unemployment

questions.sectionInstruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.prompt: What recent additions to the outskirts of their cities are both students happy about?

options.label: conference centres
sports centres
retail centres

questions.prompt: The students agree that developing disused industrial sites may

options.label: have unexpected costs
damage the urban environment
destroy valuable historical buildings

questions.prompt: The students will mention Masdar City as an example of an attempt to achieve

options.label: daily collections for waste recycling
sustainable energy use
free transport for everyone

questions.prompt: When discussing the ecotown of Greenhill Abbots, Colin is uncertain about

options.label: what its objectives were
why there was opposition to it
how much of it has actually been built
